name: HTTP Method Change
description: Backend changed HTTP method from POST to PUT without updating OpenAPI spec

backend.implementation: router.put('/api/profile/update', (req, res) => { /* handler */ }); // Changed from POST to PUT

frontend.usage: fetch('/api/profile/update', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(data) }) // Returns 404 or 405 Method Not Allowed

fields.userImpact: Profile updates fail with 404 or 405 errors. Users cannot save profile changes. Data loss risk if users repeatedly attempt updates.
